Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: April 23, 2026

⚠️ All content provided by SignalFlow Alerts is for educational and informational purposes only. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial advice. Trading involves significant risk. Please read these terms carefully before subscribing.

By accessing or using SignalFlow Alerts ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

1. The Service

SignalFlow Alerts provides a private Discord community delivering market watchlists, technical analysis, and trade setups for educational purposes. Access is granted upon purchase of an active membership through Whop.

2. Not Financial Advice

All content posted by SignalFlow Alerts — including but not limited to watchlists, technical analysis, trade setups, and commentary — is strictly for educational and informational purposes. We are not licensed financial advisors. Nothing we post should be construed as a recommendation to buy or sell any security. You are solely responsible for your own trading decisions.

3. Risk Disclosure

Trading securities involves substantial risk of loss and is not appropriate for every investor. Past performance discussed or displayed is not indicative of future results. SignalFlow Alerts makes no guarantees regarding the accuracy, completeness, or profitability of any content provided. You may lose some or all of your invested capital.

4. Membership & Billing

  • Memberships are billed on a monthly or annual basis through Whop
  • You may cancel your membership at any time through your Whop account
  • Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period
  • We do not offer refunds for partial billing periods
  • We reserve the right to modify pricing with reasonable notice

5. Member Conduct

By joining our Discord community, you agree to:

  • Not share, reproduce, or redistribute any content outside the community
  • Not harass, threaten, or demean other members
  • Not promote competing services within the server
  • Not share login credentials or provide access to non-members

Violation of these rules may result in immediate removal without refund.

6. Intellectual Property

All content published by SignalFlow Alerts — including watchlists, analysis, charts, and written commentary — is our intellectual property. You may not reproduce, redistribute, or sell any content without express written permission.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, SignalFlow Alerts and its owners shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service or reliance on any content provided, including any trading losses.

8. Termination

We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your membership at any time for violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or chargebacks, with or without prior notice.

9. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

10. Contact

For questions regarding these Terms, contact us at support@signalflowalerts.com.
